values.value: Executes Salesforce reports and returns structured results

[ { "name": "reportId", "type": "salesforce-id", "required": false, "help": "The 18-character Salesforce ID of the report to run", "label": "Report ID", "placeholder": "00O000000000000AAA" }, { "name": "reportDeveloperName", "type": "string", "required": false, "help": "The API/Developer Name of the report (alternative to reportId)", "label": "Report Developer Name" }, { "name": "maxRows", "type": "integer", "required": false, "help": "Maximum number of rows to return (default: 200)", "label": "Max Rows", "minValue": 1, "maxValue": 2000 }, { "name": "includeDetails", "type": "boolean", "required": false, "help": "Include detailed row data in response", "label": "Include Details" }, { "name": "filters", "type": "array", "required": false, "help": "Runtime filters to apply to the report. Each filter specifies column, operator, and value.", "label": "Report Filters" } ]
